overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Platform-wide usage statistics and activity.
overview.systemStatsDesc: High-level usage overview across all users.
overview.recentActivityDesc: Daily conversation volume over the last 14 days.
overview.topAgentsDesc: Most used agents by conversation count.
overview.tokenUsageByModelDesc: Token consumption distribution across LLM models.
overview.tokensByAgentDesc: Top agents by total token consumption.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage user accounts, roles, and access control.
users.totalUsers: {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}} total
users.createDesc: Add a new user account to the system.
users.setQuotaDesc: Set a monthly token quota for {username}.
users.quotaHint: Enter 0 or leave empty for unlimited usage.
users.revokeAdminDesc: {username} will lose admin access and become a regular user.
users.grantAdminDesc: {username} will gain full admin access to the system.
users.disableAccountDesc: {username} will be unable to log in until re-enabled.
users.enableAccountDesc: {username} will be able to log in again.
users.deleteUserDesc: This will permanently delete the account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Browse and moderate all user conversations.
conversations.totalConversations: {count, plural, one {# conversation} other {# conversations}} total
conversations.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete "{title}" by {username}. This cannot be undone.

connectors.title: Connectors
connectors.subtitle: Connector usage analytics and performance overview.
connectors.connectorStatsDesc: Call volume and performance across all connectors.
connectors.topConnectorsDesc: Most used connectors by call count.
connectors.callTrendDesc: Daily connector call volume over the last 14 days.

mcpServers.title: MCP Servers
mcpServers.subtitle: Global MCP servers available to all users.
mcpServers.deleteDesc: Delete global MCP server "{name}"? All users will lose access to its tools.
mcpServers.addDialogDesc: Configure a new global MCP server available to all users.
mcpServers.editDialogDesc: Update the global MCP server configuration.
mcpServers.activeDesc: Enable this server for all users

models.title: Model Management
models.description: Manage system-level LLM configurations. Resolution order: User Preference → Admin Models → ENV Fallback.
models.name: Name
models.apiKeyEditHint: Leave blank to keep the existing key.
models.envFallbackDescription: When no admin model is configured, the system uses environment variables.
models.generalModelDesc: Used for planning, analysis, and ReAct reasoning.
models.fastModelDesc: Used for DAG step execution and summarization.
models.noModels: No models configured. The system is using ENV fallback.
models.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete model "{name}"?
models.deleteWarning: If this model has an active role, the system will fall back to ENV configuration.
models.nameAndModelRequired: Name and model name are required
models.apiKeyRequiredForNew: API key is required for new models
models.resolutionChain: Resolution: User Preference → Admin Models → ENV Fallback

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: Admin actions recorded for accountability.
audit.totalEntries: {count, plural, one {# entry} other {# entries}} total
audit.noResults: No audit log entries match the current filters

storage.title: Storage
storage.subtitle: Manage user file uploads.
storage.clearDesc: This will permanently delete all {size} of files uploaded by {username}.
storage.cleanOrphanedDesc: This will delete upload directories for conversations that no longer exist in the database.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Global configuration that affects all users.
settings.registrationDesc: Control how new users can join the system.
settings.registrationOpenDesc: Anyone can create an account from the login page.
settings.registrationInviteDesc: Users need a valid invite code to register.
settings.registrationDisabledDesc: Only admins can create accounts via the Users tab.
settings.emailVerificationDesc: Require new users to verify their email with a 6-digit code before completing registration. Requires SMTP to be configured.
settings.tokenQuotaDesc: Applied to users without a personal quota. 0 means unlimited.
settings.announcementDesc: Show a banner message to all users at the top of every page.
settings.maintenanceDesc: Block all non-admin access. Admins can still log in and manage the system.
settings.maintenanceOnDesc: System is in maintenance. Non-admin requests receive 503.
settings.maintenanceOn: Maintenance mode ON -- users are blocked
settings.forceLogoutAllDesc: Invalidates every active refresh token. All users (except you) will be signed out immediately.
settings.forceLogoutDesc: This will immediately invalidate all active sessions. Every user will be signed out and must log in again. Your own session will not be affected.
settings.loggedOutSessions: Logged out {count, plural, one {# active session} other {# active sessions}}
settings.generateDesc: Create a new invite code for user registration.
settings.revokeDesc: Code "{code}" will be deactivated. Users with this code will no longer be able to register.
